title: Spiri controlled document revision history
description: Drives the cover page, the revision table, the PDF footer, and the PDF filename.

document_number.description: The controlled document number, e.g. SPIRI-OM-001. Printed on every page.

regulator_facing.description: If true, every non-draft revision must name an approver and an effective date. The build fails otherwise.

distribution_statement.description: Printed on the cover page, e.g. 'Uncontrolled when printed.'

revisions.description: Oldest first. The last entry is the current revision.

revision.description: The revision identifier, e.g. "1.0". Quote it, or YAML reads 1.0 as a number.

date.$comment: Deliberately untyped. YAML parses an unquoted 2026-01-01 into a date value, not a string, so 'type: string' here would mark a correct file as an error. The build validates dates properly and explains itself; the schema's job is autocomplete and hover help.
date.description: The date this revision was written, as an unquoted YYYY-MM-DD.

summary.description: What changed in this revision, in one line. Appears in the revision table.

draft.description: A revision still being written. Marked as a draft on the cover page, in the PDF footer, and in the PDF filename. Remove this to issue the revision.

approver.description: Who approved this revision for issue. Required for regulator-facing documents. Placeholder text such as TODO or TBD is rejected.

effective_date.$comment: Untyped for the same reason as 'date' above.
effective_date.description: The date this revision takes effect, as an unquoted YYYY-MM-DD. Required for regulator-facing documents.
